name: C-4 --verify-chain returns exit 0 when prev_hash links are consistent across the log
command: for i in 1 2 3; do bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/audit-log.sh" --append --event e$i --actor a --data '{}'; done && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/audit-log.sh" --verify-chain && echo verified 1>&2
